title: Railroad Blocks
description: Adds railroad-themed blocks and items to Minecraft.
body:
![Railroad Blocks](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/8848ca24-cffd-4c2a-a2d8-08f4aa6b572c)
![Available for Fabric](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_vector.svg)
![Available for Forge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/forge_vector.svg)
![Available for NeoForge](https://interurban.dev/resources/neoforge_vector.svg)
![Available for Quilt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/quilt_vector.svg)
[![Requires Architectury API](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/requires/architectury-api_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)
# Railroad Blocks
Railroad Blocks adds various railroad-themed blocks and items to Minecraft. The blocks are generally based on objects and items from US railroads.

Make sure to install the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) when running on Fabric or Quilt! Architectury API not required on 1.12.x.

## 🟩 Blocks
The latest version of Railroad Blocks includes the following blocks.
- Railroad Crossing Lights (Decorative)
- Dual Railroad Crossing Lights (Decorative)
- Iron Crossbuck
- Iron Pole
- Old Whistle Post
- Railroad Crossing Advance Warning Sign
- Whistle Post
- Wooden Crossbuck
- Wooden Pole
- Yard Limit Sign

## 🔨 Items
The latest version of Railroad Blocks includes the following items:
- Blue Flag
- Green Flag
- Red Flag
- Yellow Flag

## 🌐 Languages
The latest version of Railroad Blocks supports the following languages:
- 🇺🇸 American English
- 🇦🇿 Azerbaijan (92% Translated)
- 🇬🇧 British English
- 🇨🇦 Canadian English
- 🇨🇳 Simplified Chinese (71% Translated)
- 🇹🇷 Turkish (92% Translated)

[![Help me Translate](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/translate/generic-singular_vector.svg)](https://github.com/InterurbanDev/MinecraftRailroadBlocks/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)

If you encounter any issues or bugs, please report them on our [GitHub](https://github.com/InterurbanDev/MinecraftRailroadBlocks/issues/new?assignees=&labels=bug&projects=&template=bug-report.md&title=)
